description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Heel: 2"Product DetailsSilver sandals with a transparent plastic forefoot straps that extend upto the midfootCrystal embellishments on the forefoot strapSoft silver footbed with a branded heel patch TPR outsole with a silver heel and a plastic heel capMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
